# P209 (v0.9.11.25) dep-audit allowlist.
#
# Format: one CVE id per line, with `# reason` after.
# pip-audit honors GHSA-* and PYSEC-* identifiers (the Advisory IDs
# returned by the OSV database).
#
# Each entry MUST have a comment explaining either:
#   (a) the upstream fix path + ETA, or
#   (b) why the finding is not exploitable in our deployment.
#
# Allowlist entries are reviewed quarterly; stale ones get removed.
# If you're adding an entry, also note the CVE in
# todo/0.9.11/audit-followups/dep-audit-deferrals.md (or wherever
# the operator-tracking lives) so it's not forgotten.

# (No entries yet — initial baseline. New findings break CI until
# either the upstream package is bumped or a row is added here with
# justification.)
